requires: OpenAI-compatible streaming chat completions for all configured engines
OpenAI-compatible token logprobs plus response or tokenizer-resolved token IDs
strictProof.command: PIQ_SERVING_MODEL=Qwen/Qwen2.5-0.5B-Instruct PIQ_SERVING_USD_PER_GPU_HOUR=<actual-blended-gpu-hourly-cost> PIQ_SERVING_CAPTURE_TOKEN_DETAILS=true PIQ_SERVING_TOP_LOGPROBS=5 PIQ_SERVING_RESOLVE_TOKEN_IDS_WITH_TOKENIZER=true PIQ_SERVING_COLLECT_HARDWARE_METRICS=true PIQ_SERVING_REQUIRE_NATIVE_TELEMETRY=true PIQ_SERVING_REQUIRE_HARDWARE_TELEMETRY=true bash ops/serving-producers/run-smoke.sh strict-recorded-smoke

install: Run TensorRT-LLM on a Linux x86_64/aarch64 host with a supported NVIDIA GPU.
Expose its OpenAI-compatible server to this smoke runner and set PIQ_TENSORRT_LLM_URL.
